title: Sumerian/Akkadian: The Sumerian Sargon Legend
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Sumerian Sargon Legend.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Sumerian Sargon Legend.

translation.text: From 'The Sumerian Sargon Legend': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
